title: Vanilla 3D
body:
# Vanilla 3D
Adds 3D models to vanilla textures.

This resource pack adds more depth and detail to blocks and items while keeping true to the vanilla look of the game. It also changes how a few items look while being held in the player's hand, adds some alternate models and textures to a few blocks and plants for variation, and adds swords that appear damaged at low durability.

Pack is customizable with the [Respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) mod version 14.

![3D models of crafting table, furnace, and ladder.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/729a99bd9a8ba70b5a2db24c9f51150ad6b24a3a.png)

![3D models of flowers.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b09fc6f840f0880bf5e29491463440b14cfd5a8d.png)
